title: 10 Pcs Pull Bows for Gift Wrapping, 4.3 Inch Solid Colour Ribbon Bows for Wedding Christmas Halloween Birthday Party Present Baskets Decoration - Black
features: 🎁【Packing Includes】10 Pcs bows for gift wrapping are suitable for most gift wrapping, making your gift more unique and refined. Each measures about 2.8 X 95 cm, the final bow is approx. 4.3 inches/11 cm in diameter.

🎀【Just One Pull】Gone are the days of tangled ribbons and frustrating knots. This product is a hand-pull design. Simply pull the two thin ribbons taut, then push the thick ribbon upwards to instantly achieve a perfect bow. The ultimate solution for last-minute gift wrapping!

💝【Exquisite Design】Pull bows are the perfect finishing touch for presents, their final form as delicate and beautiful as a flower, adding an exquisite decorative effect to your gift boxes. 5 colours to choose from, suitable for all manner of gifts and occasions.
🏆【Quality Material】This gift bow is made from yarn and ribbon. The yarn material enhances the 3D effect of the bow design, ensuring durability and resistance to breakage or deformation.

💐【Wide Application】These pull bows are great for gift wrapping, hampers, wedding car, just married decorations, party wall, wine bottles, candy bag, bouquet decoration. Perfect for weddings, Christmas, Halloween, Easter, birthdays, Valentine's Day, anniversary day and parties.
